channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: AI in Insurance Market: USD 114.52 Billion by 2031 with North America Holding 43.95% of Share in 2025, Reports Mordor Intelligence
item.description: The AI in insurance market growth is driven by rising adoption of automated claims processing, predictive risk assessment, and cloud-based insurance platforms. The market is projected to register a CAGR of 34.20% during 2026-2031, supported by growing demand … [Intel]

item.title: Meet Mark Stevens: The billionaire VC, Nvidia board member, and Giving Pledge signer who just donated $200 million to USC
item.description: Billionaire venture capitalist Mark Stevens, an early Nvidia backer at Sequoia Capital, just made one of the largest gifts in USC history to fuel the university's AI ambitions. [Nvidia]

item.title: Scale AI wins $500m Pentagon contract, five times its previous Defense Department deal
item.description: The agreement was signed with the Pentagon’s Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office, the procurement vehicle driving the bulk of US military AI integration spending in 2025 and 2026. Microsoft, Amazon, and Google signed parallel classified-network d… [Amazon, Microsoft, Intel, Alphabet]

item.title: What did Brockman say about AI compute? #tech
item.description: What was disclosed in court During Musk v. Altman testimony, OpenAI president Greg Brockman said OpenAI expected to spend roughly $50 billion on computing in 2026, framing it as a step change from the company’s much smaller compute spend during the earlier Op… [OpenAI]

item.title: Silicon froth: AI chips are riding a massive global wave that could turn without warning
item.description: As semiconductors ride a global boom in AI expectations—with Micron and Intel shares joining the Nvidia-plus action—India’s chipmaking efforts are not just less dazzling, but less likely to fail the test of rapidly shifting demand. This race isn’t short of su… [Intel, Nvidia]

item.title: The income of the Samsung family in South Korea has doubled.
item.description: The wealth of the Samsung family, one of South Korea's largest corporate groups, has doubled to $45 billion within a year. Although it was previously speculated that the family's control might slip, they have made a very strong financial comeback and managed … [Samsung]

item.title: Breath Analyzer Analysis Report 2026: Market to More than Double to Reach $4.83 Billion by 2030 with Abbott Laboratories, Lifeloc Technologies, and Intoximeters Leading
item.description: The global breath analyzer market, valued at $1.91 billion in 2024, is projected to reach $4.83 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 16.72%. Key drivers include stringent drunk driving laws, rising demand for non-invasive diagnostics, and growing public safe… [Amazon]
